description: Keeping or showing a steady and even distribution; having different elements in proper proportion. 'Weilo' names the quality of balance—neither excess nor deficiency, all parts in right relation.
sound_symbolism: The word finds center. 'We' opens with even awareness, attention distributed. The vowel 'i' finds the center point, equilibrium located. Then 'lo' settles into stability, balance held.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'weilo lioru' (balanced life). Related to 'koru' (harmonious) but emphasizes equal distribution rather than pleasing unity.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Balanced systems sustain themselves—taking only what can be replenished, giving what is needed.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: The Middle Way seeks balance—avoiding extremes of indulgence and denial.
